mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (id, room_id, sender_id, sender_name, content, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: WITH my_rooms AS ( SELECT DISTINCT m.room_id FROM chat_messages m WHERE m.sender_id = #{userId} OR (m.room_id LIKE 'dm__%' AND ( split_part(m.room_id, '__', 2) = #{userToken} OR split_part(m.room_id, '__', 3) = #{userToken} )) OR (m.room_id LIKE 'grp__%' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM group_members gm WHERE gm.group_id = substring(m.room_id from 6) AND gm.user_id = #{userId} )) UNION SELECT DISTINCT t.room_id FROM chat_tasks t WHERE t.created_by_user_id = #{userId} OR t.assignee_user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT('grp__', g.id) FROM groups g INNER JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = g.id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} ), last_message AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (m.room_id) m.room_id, m.content, m.sender_name, m.created_at FROM chat_messages m INNER JOIN my_rooms r ON r.room_id = m.room_id ORDER BY m.room_id, m.created_at DESC ), last_task AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (t.room_id) t.room_id, t.title, t.created_at FROM chat_tasks t INNER JOIN my_rooms r ON r.room_id = t.room_id ORDER BY t.room_id, t.created_at DESC ), room_base AS ( SELECT r.room_id, lm.content AS msg_content, lm.sender_name AS msg_sender_name, lm.created_at AS msg_created_at, lt.title AS task_title, lt.created_at AS task_created_at FROM my_rooms r LEFT JOIN last_message lm ON lm.room_id = r.room_id LEFT JOIN last_task lt ON lt.room_id = r.room_id ) SELECT rb.room_id, CASE WHEN rb.msg_created_at IS NOT NULL AND (rb.task_created_at IS NULL OR rb.msg_created_at >= rb.task_created_at) THEN rb.msg_content WHEN rb.task_created_at IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('[할 일] ', COALESCE(rb.task_title, '새 과제')) ELSE '(메시지 없음)' END AS last_message, CASE WHEN rb.msg_created_at IS NOT NULL AND (rb.task_created_at IS NULL OR rb.msg_created_at >= rb.task_created_at) THEN rb.msg_sender_name WHEN rb.task_created_at IS NOT NULL THEN '과제' ELSE '-' END AS last_sender_name, CASE WHEN rb.msg_created_at IS NOT NULL AND (rb.task_created_at IS NULL OR rb.msg_created_at >= rb.task_created_at) THEN rb.msg_created_at ELSE rb.task_created_at END AS last_message_at, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN m.sender_id <> #{userId} AND (rr.last_read_at IS NULL OR m.created_at > rr.last_read_at) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0)::int AS unread_count FROM room_base rb LEFT JOIN chat_messages m ON m.room_id = rb.room_id LEFT JOIN chat_room_reads rr ON rr.room_id = rb.room_id AND rr.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY rb.room_id, rb.msg_content, rb.msg_sender_name, rb.msg_created_at, rb.task_title, rb.task_created_at ORDER BY CASE WHEN rb.msg_created_at IS NOT NULL AND (rb.task_created_at IS NULL OR rb.msg_created_at >= rb.task_created_at) THEN rb.msg_created_at ELSE rb.task_created_at END DESC NULLS LAST
